creator: bruno@ruomad.net
text:
Created attachment 235251
Corrected patch against current ports tree

Hello,
A corrected version of my port proposal, with pkg.plist fixed to add @sample for installed sample files (as per https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=265189).
My mistake, I forgot to re-add @sample tags when updating pkg.plist.
Thanks
Bruno
